Tests that the tangent of NaN returns NaN using the Math.tan function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.tan` function when given `NaN` (Not-a-Number) as input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.tan(NaN)` is also `NaN`. This test ensures that the `Math.tan` function correctly handles `NaN` inputs according to the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation and its expected output.
